prompt: Reduce the number of pedestrians in high-density areas of the image, according to the reference heatmap.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the street crossing scene, to reduce the number of pedestrians. Use image 2 as a reference heatmap to identify the high-density areas for pedestrian reduction. Specifically, decrease the pedestrian count in the regions of image 1 that spatially correspond to the yellow and blue rectangular areas shown in image 2. Implement a more significant reduction in the areas corresponding to the blue-colored regions of image 2, as these indicate the highest pedestrian density.
